classifications.phrase: The target will remain in place until progress is being made towards the goals for…
The Board will not increase the cash rate target until progress is being made towards…
it is confident that inflation will be sustainably within the 2–3 per cent target band
This accommodative approach will be maintained as long as it is required

payload.rationale: The statement signals a dovish stance focused on supporting employment and growth through maintained accommodation, with rate increases conditional on employment progress and inflation confidence.
